title: this is what Asuka whould look like if she was real
display_title: this is what Asuka whould look like if she was real
wikitext:
[]: this is what Asuka whould look like if she was real             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Fri Nov 03, 2006 12:55 am ok Asuka lovers here it is http://www.deviantart.com/deviation/41144377/ isn't that how Asuka whould look like if she was real and a tad bit older and a differnt hairstyle? this woman stare is buring a hole in my heart!!! :cry: :oops: btw if if doesn't show up right-click on the little box and click show pic i dont know why it didin't show up though.....

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Nov 03, 2006 1:16 am pic does not work dude... :roll:...and yes im doing the "show pic" thingy just reup it to imageshack or imagevenue

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 03, 2006 1:46 am They probably have anti-hotlinking measures. Hotlinking is bad, mmkay.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Nov 03, 2006 5:36 am I bet she would have two arms.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Nov 03, 2006 6:54 am She is just too cute... I must run away!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Nov 03, 2006 1:14 pm I have speculations on whether she is a real red head. Plus Asukaâ€™s eyes are blue, not green.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Fri Nov 03, 2006 8:25 pm She's s a strawberry blonde. That much is evident. MaggotMaster wrote: I bet she would have two arms.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sat Nov 04, 2006 8:58 pm Hey man I ain't see no picture...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Nov 04, 2006 9:01 pm I don't agree.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sat Nov 04, 2006 11:01 pm i see her now... um...nah...

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Sun Nov 05, 2006 1:58 am Somehow I don't picture Asuka as very warm or "huggable" gal. I'm thinking more on the lines of a more "lithe" frame. That girl, pretty as she is, has too much meat on her bones; well for Asuka qualifications at least. The truth is Asuka is fictional, and you would be hard pressed to find a normal girl who could be as skinny as a cartoon Asuka.

[]: Re: this is what Asuka whould look like if she was real             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Nov 05, 2006 2:20 am Evangelion Oi! wrote: isn't that how Asuka whould look like if she was real and a tad bit older and a differnt hairstyle?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 05, 2006 10:25 am This looks a little more like a 1/4 Japanese girl, with normal hair colouring: http://www.h2.dion.ne.jp/~bunchow/ToliFiles/figure.f/asuka2.html

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 05, 2006 12:10 pm Mr. Tines wrote: This looks a little more like a 1/4 Japanese girl, with normal hair colouring: http://www.h2.dion.ne.jp/~bunchow/ToliFiles/figure.f/asuka2.html

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Nov 05, 2006 5:32 pm Other than the blue eyes, she just looks like a regular Japanese girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Sun Nov 05, 2006 6:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I don't agree.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 05, 2006 7:33 pm it makes no sense whatsoever to give Asuka an Asian appearance... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 05, 2006 8:12 pm Good point. Isn't she 3/4 German and 1/4 Japanese? :?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 05, 2006 8:16 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Good point. Isn't she 3/4 German and 1/4 Japanese? :?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sun Nov 05, 2006 8:24 pm sry i hafta do this. This is Asuka period. Im sorry if you like Asuka. http://www.southparkx.net/gallery/data/media/2/satan.jpg cant imagine her any other way
